channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: No deal with Iran except ‘unconditional surrender’: Trump

- ‘No deal with Iran except unconditional surrender,’ Trump says

- Trump: No deal with Iran, US will only accept regime's ‘unconditional surrender’
- Trump says there will be no deal with Iran except 'unconditional surrender'
- Trump: No deal with Iran, except 'unconditional surrender'
- No Deal With Iran Except Unconditional Surrender - Trump
- Iran Rejects Cease-Fire Negotiations, Says Ready for U.S. Ground Invasion]]>

item.title: Israel claims it hit Hezbollah command centres in Beirut’s Dahiyeh

item.title: Israeli army Arabic spokesperson says Khamenei's bunker destroyed
